channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What is Iran’s Strait of Hormuz protocol and will other nations accept it?
item.description: Tehran's plans to tax ships passing through the strait and raise money to rebuild is already seeing pushback.

item.title: The economic cost of US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The economic cost of US-Israel war on Iran

item.title: US-Iran talks in Pakistan: Who’s attending, what’s on the agenda?
item.description: Islamabad hosts negotiations as US and Iran seek off-ramp. But deep mistrust and regional tensions threaten talks.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel kills hundreds in one day
item.description: Israel launches a wave of strikes in Lebanon that has killed hundreds, despite a US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Funeral held for Al Jazeera’s Wishah killed in Israeli strike in Gaza
item.description: More than 260 journalists have been killed by Israel in Gaza since the start of the genocide in October 2023.

item.title: Why Israel’s attacks on Lebanon could cripple US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Ceasefire dispute escalates as US and Israel exclude Lebanon, raising fears of a broader regional conflict.

item.title: Several people reported killed in fresh Israeli attacks on Lebanon
item.description: Lebanon bears the brunt and US-Iran truce at risk as Israel claims killing of a close aide to Hezbollah's leader.

item.title: The war on Iran: Nobody won, everyone paid
item.description: The US-Israeli campaign has failed to achieve its goals. Iran has been badly hit, and the Gulf is paying the bill too.

item.title: Can global supply chains recover from the Iran war?
item.description: Conflict upends flow of critical raw materials for manufacturing, aviation and technology.

item.title: Iran has been bloodied, but it is winning against the US-Israel axis
item.description: The US and Israel thought they could decimate Iran. But Iran's survival - despite massive human costs - is a victory.
